_comment: Source registry. Update `pinned_sha` to a real Git commit SHA before running `uv run football data bootstrap`. The values below are PLACEHOLDERS — the system will fail loudly until they are updated. To update: 1) clone the source repo locally, 2) `git rev-parse HEAD` to get the SHA, 3) replace the placeholder. For StatsBomb use a release tag (e.g. `v0.0.7`).

martj42_results.description: International football results (Mart Jürisoo). Used for the canonical result backbone and Elo history.

martj42_shootouts.description: Penalty shootout results. Used to derive the advancer on knockout matches that ended in a 90-minute draw.

openfootball_worldcup.description: Open Football World Cup dataset. Provides round/stage metadata for World Cup matches.

openfootball_euro.description: Open Football Euro dataset. Optional; provides Euro stage metadata.

openfootball_copa_america.description: Open Football Copa América dataset. Optional.

openfootball_gold_cup.description: Open Football Gold Cup dataset. Optional.

statsbomb_open_data.description: StatsBomb open-data repo (git). Used only for optional xG / event enrichment; coverage is partial and missingness is tracked.
